queries.question: Give me the privacy setting value for each streaming service.
queries.sql: SELECT Privacy_Settings.setting_value  from Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings join Privacy_Settings on Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings.privacy_settings_id = Privacy_Settings.setting_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings.privacy_settings_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the privacy setting value for each streaming service.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , privacy_settings.setting_value from Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings join Privacy_Settings on Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings.privacy_settings_id = Privacy_Settings.setting_id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?setting_value WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_privacy_settings a :Streaming_Services_Privacy_Settings .
  ?privacy_settings a :Privacy_Settings .
  ?streaming_services_privacy_settings p:hasPrivacy_Settings ?privacy_settings .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_privacy_settings p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?privacy_settings p:setting_value ?setting_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the privacy setting value for each streaming service.
